news.title: Trump says rescued U.S. airman 'seriously wounded,' threatens to strike Iran power plants and bridges
news.summary: Trump says the officer was rescued "deep in Enemy Territory" in mountainous terrain.

news.title: Chinese chip firms hit record high revenue driven by the AI boom and U.S. curbs
news.summary: Chinese chip companies have benefited from strong domestic demand for AI as U.S. tech curbs have bolstered local firms.

news.title: 'Anything but autos': Can defense save Europe’s ailing car industry?
news.summary: The transition from wheels to weapons is achievable in part because many of the underlying skills are highly transferable, according to experts.

news.title: 'Silent killers': How AI start-ups are trying to solve one of the retail industry's biggest problems
news.summary: The rapid evolution of generative AI has finally made these applications good enough to meaningfully impact retailers' bottom lines.

news.title: Warsh nomination moves ahead, putting Trump's competing Fed plans on a collision course
news.summary: A Senate committee will consider Kevin Warsh's nomination even as one of its members still plans to block it.

news.title: Stocks Sink in Broad AI Rout Sparked by China's DeepSeek
news.summary: U.S. stocks were mostly lower, with the Nasdaq leading declines as makers of AI infrastructure suffered steep falls, many in the double digits. Nvidia was down 16%.

news.title: Comex Gold, Silver Settle Lower
news.summary: Gold settled 1.4% lower, down two of the past three sessions, and silver fell 2.5%, down three of the past four sessions.

news.title: DeepSeek Won't Sink U.S. AI Titans
news.summary: Panic fueling the selloff of Nvidia, Broadcom and other tech giants is overblown.

news.title: Arabica Coffee Prices Hit Record on U.S., Colombia Tariff Spat
news.summary: Arabica coffee prices hit a record level, as traders digested the withdrawal of President Trump’s threats to impose tariffs and economic sanctions on Colombia.
